products: Mdify - Chrome extension to convert articles to clean .md for AI agents

engagement_note: To engage with 10+ posts on X, Chris needs to manually like, retweet, and comment on trending AI/tech posts from accounts like: @ylecun, @AndrewYNg, @karpathy, OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.

viral_tweet.content: The smartest AI people are converging on one truth: Markdown is becoming the lingua franca for AI agents. Why? Because it's structured but human-readable. Convert your articles to clean .md and watch your AI workflows become 10x more effective. The future is clean data. 🚀 #AI #Markdown #Productivity
viral_tweet.estimated_reach: High - taps into AI agent trend + developer productivity pain point

product_marketing_tweet.content: You're feeding AI agents with messy HTML web pages and wondering why they hallucinate. Stop. Use Mdify to convert any article to pristine Markdown. Your AI agents will thank you with better answers, faster. One click. Perfect .md every time. chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/mdify 🔥
product_marketing_tweet.angle: Pain-point driven: messy input = bad AI output
